records.title: Establish AI Assistant Operating System Notion hub
records.final_outcome: Notion workspace now hosts the AI Assistant Operating System hub, child pages, and Reviews / Approvals database.
records.worked: Documented operating-system principles, guardrails, Mirror schema, and approval database with template.
records.failed: No automated Notion sync yet; manual creation only.
records.lesson_learned: Keep new governance docs grouped under a single hub for visibility.
records.follow_up_recommendation: Document any future architecture shifts before updating the mirror contract.

records.title: Establish preliminary mirror pipeline
records.final_outcome: Local source file, build script, validator, and status report now exist and operate end-to-end for the Reviews / Approvals mirror.
records.worked: Created source + export JSON seeds, build/validate/status scripts, and npm scripts to invoke them.
records.failed: Notion pull remains a stub without real API calls.
records.lesson_learned: Keep source, build, and validation steps chained so exports stay fresh before adding live sync.
records.follow_up_recommendation: Implement the Notion pull stub once the integration tokens/test database setup are ready.
